reviews.review_description: The contents are already dated. They announced some concert on their SNS but won't show it here. So I don't know what's the point of this app. Totally useless now. The Aespa concert didn't even got released. Now the Lesserafim one is exclusive on venues and won't be launched here. Concerts are PPV anyway so I don't get it why they hold back releasing content here.
We have not seen a new show in about 2yrs. While the theater shows are growing, those of us who never have them near us get to suffer. When will the Meta Quest app see new content?

So the game itself is great its just they have like BTS Alex Warren and popular and trendy people they need to add like supported artists like juice wrld XXXTentacion trippy red like those people add rap is what I should say but they add like trendy people not people who know and support

Best VR concerts I've ever seen. Of course everyone wants more concerts but the quality they provided was top notch. For what is there this is an easy 5 star. Really rooting for the Amaze team to continue and seek more concerts.

This started off as an amazing app. It would have been my all time fav meta app except the developers haven't updated it in over a yr. Theres no new concerts and even the ones that were "coming soon" like kai and aespa are now gone.  They also haven't been responding to anyone asking questions about upcoming content. Such a disappointment.

This is one of the best VR apps there is. The quality of the concerts on here is out of this world. It's just short of actually being there! Please, please, please add more concerts and artists. If you were to advertise this more so users could see just how amazing this is, you would sale this like hotcakes! PLEASE ADD MORE ARTISTS!


Mike
Kpop VR concerts such as BP, twice, Enhypen &team and...
Been waiting for more concerts that were supposed to be coming soon but never get released or even given an explanation on why they don't update anymore

reviews.review_title: I am amazed by this app
reviews.review_description:
The interface is well done, and the quality is really good! You get access to one free download per artist, which was great when you aren't immediately familiar with the artist. I am going to purchase a few of the concerts that are being offered. 
I hope more people check this out so we can see more artist become available. 
I had a great experience. It is a 5 star app, and it's free to try.  Don't miss it

The quality is amazing, but the library is very poor. I was expecting to see the concerts they advertise on the web site, but they are not in the app. 
I find extremely disappointing there is no communication what will be added and when (coming soon feature is not working at all).
There are no VR cinema concerts running in my country, so I was counting on this app
How about enhypen astro eunwoo Illit bts stray kids Katseye shinee &team etcetera... The concert is amazing and would love to experience more !!!

I absolutely love amaze. It really brings the concert to you and the quality is great. The only thing I can wish for is that they update and add more content. To the online version. I’m really looking forward to the Kai concert and the Ateez Concert and I hope that it comes soon. Because I’m ready to buy….

great app, I just wish there were more artists and some kind of update as to when they release new artists. I’ve quit playing because of there not being any new concerts to watch. PLEASE add skz, Ateez, ENHYPEN and others!!!

I love this app it’s so emersive but there’s so little choice in the library - I’ve seen on social media there are more kpop concerts on the app but they’re not showing on Metaquest 2 ? PLEASE can we have BTS content that would be a dream!! 💜💜

reviews.review_title: I really want to like this.
reviews.review_description:
I would prefer if this was actual concerts.  The ones I tried were studio performances with effects and whilst the quality was fine, it just lacked vibe and felt a bit lifeless.

The whole concept of this app could easily be more than just an app with songs on it, if the devs sought   investors and made this a big and ever expanding library and legitimate outlet for VR gigs then this could really become a huge enterprise.  

Maybe on site 180 VR concert recording and VR conversion of existing concerts.  

The app feels like it is in absolute infancy but like it also has potential to be absolutely huge and successful.  The devs really need to network and get some financial and music industry backing then this concept could take off in a huge way.  Who wouldn't want to pay to be immersed in a VR concert of their favourite artists?

I give 3 stars with the mid rating being lack of content.  I have uninstalled to free space but will definitely comeback to check for updates to this and if it expands the library then this would become an essential permanent install on my Quest.
This is incredible! Has so much potential. Small library though. I hope it grows soon. Please add Stray Kids!!!!
I see they took Aespa and Kai off the list. I do hope in time they have them on the list and exo! There needs to be more vr concerts.
This game is good but it needs more artists, i won't be playing this if no Straykids, pls add them and other popular artists if u want more ppl to play.

Very impressive visual and audio with outstanding effects. I know you can watch free concerts on horizon worlds. But it just can't beat the outstanding quality of this app. Only complaints I have are : 1) it seems a little pricey at $15.99 for just four or five songs . Should be at least seven or eight , bare minimum. 2) Needs a bigger pool of artists / concerts .  Still overall , this is a great app for those wishing to experience unbeatable closeups , of their favorite pop stars .
This is the way to get as close as possible to the singers. Great experience and I'm looking forward to concerts by Ateez, Aespa and many others artist.
Its amazing but it would make it better if u added yungblud to it

This one is way better compared to its competitors. The presentation is slick, video quality is awesome and you can download concerts for uninterrupted viewing. The best part is, downloads don't get canceled if you close the app or something else happens. It resumes where it was last. So even if your internet isn't all that great, you can still use this app to get the best quality VR concerts in the business.

reviews.review_title: Eminem would be the Most Epic experience
reviews.review_description:
The AmazeVR experience is amazing and deserves a 5 out of 5 rating! However, there is one key addition that could take it to a whole new level

I want to strongly request that you bring Eminem to your platform. Having Eminem perform an exclusive VR concert would be a massive, groundbreaking event that could redefine what a VR show can be. The impact would be so big that many people especially Eminem’s fans would buy VR headsets just to experience this! not merely to play games. I recommended AmazeVR to another friend, and the first thing he said was, “This needs Eminem.”

In addition to Eminem, adding other big stars like Britney Spears, Shakira, Backstreet Boys, Snoop Dogg, 50 Cent, or Nicki Minaj would create an even bigger effect, making AmazeVR the ultimate destination for unforgettable VR concerts.

This kind of star power is exactly what will take AmazeVR to the next level and make it the most talked-about VR experience ever.

Looking forward to seeing these amazing shows happen soon! Keep up the fantastic work!

This app is terrible. If you get beyond it crashing you will find a tiny amount of 3d music videos. These are not concerts. A concert is filmed live and gives you the feeling you are three. These are crap music videos with a horrible CGI background. The 180vr concerts in Meta are a thousand times better. In addition to not knowing the meaning of “concert “the meaning of “coming soon “ escapes them.  I have lost hope the group I wanted to will ever show up.

Update July 2025 Aespa is still “coming soon” this is outright fraud.  

Update Dec 2025.  Aespa not coming soon, just removed. What a joke!

Grabbed this to try, downloaded the Avenged Sevenfold demo, stuttered initially, rebooted and worked. After watching, every time I look down there's a vertical bar of white/grey taking up 1/3 of the left side. Happens every time after selecting something. Uninstalled
What more can I say.

This has been the most painful experience in VR ever. 13 minute download it says, but then you cant look away or play something else or put the headset down or it will stop the download.
The download ended up taking HOURS! Constantly jumping up and down in time and % complete, right near the end jumping from 5 seconds left to 20 minutes. And then.. it cancelled at 99% it just closed and had to start downloading from 0% again.

I am so fkn angry. $18 and 2 hrs of my life wasted! Make it a DLC that downloads via the app store ffs so we dont have to sit inside the app starting at the menu with the elevator music going insane!
amazing

Please add ATEEZ 
Tell me when to expect an update with them and if it will happen at all or I've wasted my time downloading the app?

Been announced for more than an year, and still not released
You could’ve just let us know if it has been cancelled.
Don’t just let us hang in there 🤮

reviews.review_title: So good but lack of artists
reviews.review_description:
Bring to the app One Direction (together or as solo artist), Stray Kids, The Weeknd, Justin Bieber, etc

These groups have a huge fandom and will raise the app
I can't wait for Aespa contents. I'll give it 5 stars when it's released.
I just saw the avenged sevenfold concert and it was 13 dollars and I would say it’s really worth it.

My mind was blown 
...

reviews.review_title: The TXT concert is available in the US
reviews.review_description: And it's well worth the 20USD price tag. The video is really clear and the backdrops are nice.
I wish they would more bands like Ghost ..black pink

I bought the txt show while i enjoyed it there was moments between songs where they spoke but sadly there wasn't subtitle, and some gliches if you return to home during a song.

In general very good and immersive experience, but it is lacking in term of content release (probably 2 new concerts a year), wish they released more! And there are  some concerts without release date even though they finished cinema tour.

reviews.review_title: 看不到aespa只好把你刪除了
reviews.review_description: aespa aespa aepsa

I'm not sure if mine is bugged but when I select TXT it shows the members however, I can't watch the actual VR experience. It just says Coming Soon. I sent an email to AmazeVR but no one has responded. A bit disappointed to be honest.

What a cool way of watching music. The quality is impressive. It is an almost real live experience to experience the artists so close. Way different than in a stadium where you can see only tiny artists far away from you.  However, the camera should maintain a certain “social” distance from the artists. Some shots are simply too close and seem almost frightening in VR. I don't like so much the virtual backgroud, because the green screen effect eats up  some immersion.  I'd prefer a "real" stage setting. I also like watching life concerts on MetaTV. However the camera point of view switches around all the time. I'd rather have a fixed position or the ability to choose and switch my prefered point of view. 

I'd love to see more content from popular artists.

Yeah so don’t count on these guys to hold their promises, when they say that something’s coming soon what they actually mean is that it’ll come eventually but not anywhere in the near future. Wasted potential right here.

I've been trying to get answers for so long from AmazeVR ? I'm a U.S user, for 1-2 years I've been waiting on the release for Kai and Aespa's concert,and I expected it would be release before TXT's (since they we made and advertised first).I get a notification for TXT's at least being available for VR users now and I attempted to watch it and after updating the app, it still says 'coming soon' but I hear Canadian MOAs at least have access,so I'm curious to know why other fans aren't getting access at the same time? Can we expect to get it sometime soon?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your interest in the AmazeVR Concert!!

As we announced, the VR Concert is only available in countries where the offline VR Concert tour has already concluded. Since discussions about the tour are still ongoing in the U.S., we have not yet released the online VR Concerts in this region.

We sincerely appreciate your understanding and patience regarding this matter.  

Thank you,  
AmazeVR Support

reviews.review_description: it would be better with hand tracking, vision pro has that. update!!
When will the TXT , Aespa and KAI concerts be available in the UK because it’s been to long of a wait as it always says “ coming soon “

Can anyone tell me when the Tomorrow X Together concert will be available for purchase? I saw the VR concert in New York and was blown away. I asked for a Meta Quest 3 for Christmas because I saw their concert would be available in mid December. I was disappointed to see “coming soon” when I tried to access it. Can anyone please tell me when it will be available to watch?
Amazing. One of my favorite things in vr. Good amount of content for free. Needs more artists.

The app is good but it's nothing like melody vr where u had crowds around ya and made u feel in there.... yea these background effects and the hologram of the artist is very detailed  but they say it's a concert with just 4 songs..a concert is bout 10 to 14 songs actually and very little content only few artist and the 2 that says coming soon was announced like 4 months ago or longer and still ain't came to the app... what looked very promising is now fading in my opinion...we need more content for starters and more known artists...my stars remain low until I see improvement then I'll do 5 star ...

Update December 13th 2024


How u gonna have the group Tomorrow x out before Aespa ? We been waiting on them for half the summer ...very slacking not enough content people talking bad bout this app lately..had definite potential but I'm not seeing it and it's not like a live concert with no audiences that's not realistic like melody vr had.... people talk bout that issue 😒

We were super excited to find this app and use it as our go to when showing people Meta VR. The closeness is mega uncomfy lol but very cool. However, since we installed this a year ago they have not brought any new videos. Also, every single time I get on my headset I have to reinstall the videos. It's annoying.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We have fixed the issue where videos are deleted after a period of time. Please make sure the app is updated to prepare for more concerts coming soon!

reviews.review_description: Bring some more artist like every month
This game is awesome I like how you can experience a concert in vr I would like to see Metallica in this game and experience a concert from them in this game

Why the hell do I have to re-download the concerts seemingly every other day?..
Nothing is different so why the constant need to re-download??
Uninstalled and reinstalled and the same thing happens. Having to re download the concerts at least once a week. This needs looking into as it can take hours to download them.

developer_response.body: We're so sorry to hear you're experiencing this issue. You should not need to re-download a concert you've already downloaded, unless you choose to delete it. If you continue having this issue, it may help to delete the app and reinstall it. If that doesn't help, please email us at support@amazevr.com

reviews.review_description: Saw the A7X VR Concert, I loved it. Growing up and listening to the band for so long, this was awesome. Seen them live before, but this VR experience was amazing. Got my brother to buy the concert VR too. 🤘🏼

I'm a long-time fan of Avenged and waited for a while for this to come out, and I was blown away! Much more than I expected. The scenes, the energy, everything was amazing!! I've seen them live, but this was much more than just a live performance. Lack of a better word it was an intimate experience with a band I've been a fan of for years and years! I hope more artists make amazevr presentations!!

As a long-time fan eagerly awaiting the A7X VR concert, I was beyond excited to finally dive into this immersive experience. Let me tell you, it exceeded every expectation I had. It brought me closer to the band than I ever thought possible and the energy pulsating through the virtual space was electrifying, and being face-to-face with my favorite musicians was a surreal moment I'll never forget. 

If you're a true A7X fan or just a lover of intense rock energy, this VR concert is an absolute must-see. It's an experience that will leave you breathless and craving more.
I love A7X and I wish I can tell Zach he is good

reviews.review_title: It's just not what I want it to be
reviews.review_description:
Potential is there, and maybe upcoming avenged sevenfold will be that one, but here are some major issues I have after watching all the free content:
1. It froze my whole quest 3 during the tutorial requiring a system reboot.
2. It's too fake.  Fake scenery, fake prerecorded vocals, heavy work done on the artists. It takes away from the realism. 
3. "You will own nothing and be happy." .. "concerts" are currently $7 for about 15 mins of video (4 of which is one of the free songs), and you only "own" them for a year.  
4. Content selection is all pop, no full bands, one even having fake generated backup dancers. 
5. Attempts at DRM are intrusive... no opening the oculus menu in the app.
6. My internet is fast. Let me stream video. 

It feels like they have overcomplicated what people actually want.  They are spending tons of money on these computer generated rooms and effects when all I want is to see a band or person perform LIVE with some 180 3D VR cameras setup." The warning" concert on meta TV is a perfect example.  It doesn't even need to be a private recording, just setup cameras on stage.   You dont get that close to the musician personal feeling with a prerecorded lip synced track.  I would pay $15 a month to have access to a decent catalog of 180 3d vr concerts as a preferred alternative to buying them one at a time with 1 year access.   I dont think it is my fault that I expected concerts to mean live concerts, and not heavily edited music videos covering a few songs.   

Here is to hoping Avenged sevenfold isn't a prerecorded track with lip sync and fake drums/guitar lol.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed review! We’re sorry to hear about the technical issues you experienced in the app, and we will look into these issues so we can resolve them.

We wanted to address a couple of points that you raised:

-We do not block users from opening the Oculus Menu — in fact, it is not possible for us to block users from opening the Oculus Menu.
-We will be updating our system for purchasing concerts very soon, which should address some of your concerns regarding ownership.
-Avenged Sevenfold will feature live performances recorded on-set, similar to the UPSAHL and T-Pain VR Concerts currently available in the app.

Thanks again for taking the time to review our app! We hope that our future Avenged Sevenfold VR Concert and more coming out this year will give you the sort of experience you’re looking for.

reviews.review_title: Experience was great but there's issues
reviews.review_description:
I got the Zara Larson concert and it was amazing. However after a while, the video stopped loading. All I would get were pink screen. I've tried re-installing the app and the concert and I still keep getting the pink screen. Hopefully they fix this issue because it's been a few weeks now and still the same issue.

Edit: deleting the storage and re-dl helped

So you use to be able to buy the full concert and actually own it not just for 12 months think that is ridiculous I own the Megan concert on their first app but it doesn’t play on the new app. Would have to lease it for 12 months what is really going on

After using this app I lost my games library, it was moved to apps and I can't reset it to where it was.
My boarders were also shimmering and distorted.
Uninstalled the app and the boarders went back to normal but my library is still messed up.

developer_response.body: We're so sorry to hear that you had issues with your device after installing our app, but as far as we can tell there is no reason that our app would cause the issues you're describing. We recommend reaching out to Meta Quest directly for further assistance.

reviews.review_description: Nice sound 👍🏻 effects great 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
